calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL PICCININI FOR PLAINTIFF ROBERT A IMHOFF, ALSO PRESENT
DAVID DODGE FOR MANUAL GUTIERREZ, ALSO PRESENT WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER YOGER ALMENDAREZ

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO VACATE PROPERTY 2407 BRYANT STREET ON OR BEFORE 5/5/05. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN A BROOM CLEAN CONDITION, REASONABLE WEAR AND TEAR ACCEPTABLE AS WELL AS ANY DAMAGES PREVIOUSLY CAUSED BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TO REMOVE ALL PERSONAL PROPERTY AND ANYTHING LEFT BEHIND BECOMES THE PROPERTY OF THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TO PAY $5000. ON OR BEFORE 5PM 3/25/05 TO LANDMARK REALTY AT 573 SO.VANNESS AVE. SECURITY DEPOSIT IN THE SUM OF $2025.20 DEEMED FORFEITED.
RENTAL AGREEMENT DEEMED FORFEITED. BOTH PARTIES WAIVE ANY AND ALL CLAIMS PER CIVIL CODE 1542. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. IF DEFENDANT VACATES AND PAYS THE $5000 TIMELY, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
STIPULATION AND JUDGMENT WILL BE PUT IN WRITING AND SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES. BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS. DEFDANT AGREES THROUGH INTERPRETER. BOTH PARTIES WAIVE CONFLICT OF JUDGE PRO TEM HAVING REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF PREVIOUSY ON AN UNRELATED MATTER.

JUDGE PRO TEM: GUY STILSON; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: JUNE LEATHLEY (218)
